testcase.name: videoProduction.generate — happy path > calls VideoAgent(mode=production), writes history
videoProduction.generate — zod validation > sourceCopy less than 10 chars → TRPCError BAD_REQUEST
videoProduction.generate — zod validation > sourceCopy = 10 (min boundary) → pass
videoProduction.generate — zod validation > sourceCopy = 3001 → TRPCError BAD_REQUEST
videoProduction.generate — fallback path (LLMTimeoutError) > agent returns isFallback=true → history written with isFallback=true
videoProduction.generate — cross-account RLS isolation > findFirst returns null → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
US-003 AC-8: videoProduction.generate integration — nock Anthropic SDK + real DB > generate: nock intercepts Anthropic call, writes history + cost_log to real DB, less than 5s
